ListItem.Para: Both thrust levers are manually set for takeoff and go-around thrust.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative autothrottle servo motor (AMM DDG 22-31-02).

ListItem.Para: For L autothrottle servo motor, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker A/T SERVO-L and lock with an INOP tag.
For R autothrottle servo motor, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker A/T SERVO-R and lock with an INOP tag.

Note.Para: The AUTOTHROTTLE L or R advisory message will be displayed.
The autothrottle cannot be engaged on the ground.
The TPR/N1trim function of the EEC will operate normally, provided both autothrottle arm switches are positioned to A/T ARM.

For both autothrottle arm switches positioned to A/T ARM, the AUTOTHROTTLE DISC caution will be annunciated if the flight crew selects FLCH, VNAV, or TO/GA. Pressing the autothrottle disconnect switch will clear the caution.

ListItem.Para: Set both autothrottle switches to A/T ARM.
After takeoff, if desired set the deactivated autothrottle servo motor A/T ARM switch OFF to restore functionality of the operative autothrottle servo motor.
For go-around, set both thrust levers manually.
Approach minimums do not require use of the autothrottles.
EDTO beyond 180 minutes is not conducted.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative autothrottle servo motors (AMM DDG 22-31-02).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker A/T SERVO-L and lock with an INOP tag.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker A/T SERVO-R and lock with an INOP tag.

Note.Para: The AUTOTHROTTLE L and R advisory message will be displayed.
The TPR/N1trim function of the EEC will operate normally, provided both autothrottle arm switches are positioned to A/T ARM.

For both autothrottle arm switches positioned to A/T ARM, the AUTOTHROTTLE DISC caution will be annunciated if the flight crew selects FLCH, VNAV, or TO/GA. Pressing the autothrottle disconnect switch will clear the caution.

ListItem.Para: EDTO beyond 180 minutes is not conducted
For takeoff, set both autothrottle switches to A/T ARM.
